basic_details.job_title: HAL Visiting Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) has published the Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. AD-KORWA/VC/2026/. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Visiting Consultant positions. Candidates up to 64 years of age and holding D. Ortho, MS/DNB, or MD/DCH qualifications are eligible to apply through offline mode. The application process will remain active until 16 June 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and application instructions below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years as on 16 June 2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

salary_details.details: The salary for the Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) post is Rs. 7000 per day.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: hal-india.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the HAL Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) posts is 16 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) positions in Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Orthopedic post?
faq.answer: For the Orthopedic post, candidates must possess a D. Ortho/MS/DNB qualification. This is a mandatory requirement for eligibility.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Visiting Consultant posts is 64 years as of 16 June 2026. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Visiting Consultant (Specialist Doctor) posts will receive a salary of Rs. 7000 per day.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the HAL Visiting Consultant posts will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for HAL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which city and state are these jobs located in?
faq.answer: The HAL recruitment is for positions located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 227412.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates to remember for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Key dates include the notification release on 02 June 2026 and the last date for application submission on 16 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches by the last date.
